responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Migrate all IVX screens to one canonical reel card, clean up the mobile app for production, build a signed release APK, and verify the full stack end-to-end.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Owner-approved design: full-screen vertical reel with investment/active badges, ROI, min investment, action rail, View Deal + Invest Now CTAs
- Old cards (`TrustDealCard`, `InstagramProjectCard`, `DealVideoCard`) must be fully removed
- Deal Detail must never show infinite "Loading Deal" — requires timeout, retry, back, specific error states
- All screens use unified route: `/jv-invest?jvId=<dealId>`
- Production APK: no debug banners, no dev-only text, no console.log noise, production API URLs only, no Rork proxy dependency, no old AI gateway config
- APK must be installable on a real Android device with all critical tests passing
- GitHub push workflow: cherry-pick onto GitHub main (local origin is Rork git router)
- `.rork/history/` files excluded from GitHub commits

## Progress
### Done
- Canonical reel card migration complete: `CanonicalInvestmentReelCard.tsx` (1031 lines) used in Main, Reels, Landing, Invest — zero old card imports remain
- `jv-invest.tsx` fixed: 10s timeout, not-found/network-error/failed states, retry + back buttons
- 25 regression tests in `canonical-reel-card.test.ts` — all passing
- Backend deployed live at commit `21e7bb80` — health: `healthy`, AI: `ok=true`, provider: `vercel_ai_gateway`, keyPrefix: `vck_***`, model: `openai/gpt-4o`
- AI key working: `OPENAI_API_KEY` set to `vck_5ybSHs1ylBLpQL2mS1gYXzyAQwtLsTqKfjgsQtWH5th6DL2MXB3ReOFy` on Render
- Live API tests pass: video feed (5 videos, Casa Rosario linked to `casa-rosario-001`), home feed (4 blocks: 3 deals + 1 video), AI test (`ok=true`, `responseText=IVX_AI_TEST_OK`), public chat AI works, multimodal upload routes registered (6 routes), upload routes require auth (expected)
- Mobile cleanup completed:
  - Removed old Render URL `ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com` from `app/login.tsx`, `lib/platform-persistence.ts`, `app/ivx/variables.tsx` → all now use `https://api.ivxholding.com`
  - Removed debug UI from `login.tsx`: authVersionBadge, configStatusBanner, repairDebugCard, telemetry panel (UI elements removed; 6 dead code references remain — constant, error string, orphaned styles)
  - Removed "Proof"/diagnostics button from `chat.tsx` (sync-diagnostics link)
  - Cleaned ~40 `console.log`/`console.warn` statements across home.tsx, _layout.tsx, chat.tsx, invest/index.tsx, landing.tsx, jv-invest.tsx
  - Fixed lint error: moved `useMemo` before conditional returns in `_layout.tsx` (rules-of-hooks violation)
- Version incremented: 1.4.3 → 1.4.4, versionCode 34 → 35, buildMarker updated to `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_16_BUILD_35_PRODUCTION_RELEASE`
- Validation all pass:
  - TypeScript: 0 errors
  - Lint: 0 errors (632 pre-existing warnings)
  - Tests: 461 pass, 1 fail (pre-existing Playwright), 1 error
- Expo prebuild: `bunx expo prebuild --platform android` succeeded, generated `expo/android/` native project
- NDK 27.1.12297006 installed via sdkmanager (required by Expo SDK 54)
- Build fixes applied:
  - `expo-location` v15.1.1 incompatible with SDK 54 — removed `node_modules/expo-location/android` directory (app doesn't use it)
  - Fixed `classifier = 'sources'` → `archiveClassifier = 'sources'` in expo-location build.gradle (Gradle 8.x compat)
  - Fixed `compileSdkVersion` → `compileSdk` in expo-location build.gradle
- **APK BUILD SUCCESSFUL**: `./gradlew assembleRelease` completed in 59s, 506 tasks
  - File: `expo/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk`
  - Size: 81MB
  - applicationId: `com.ivxholdings.app`
  - versionCode: 35, versionName: `1.4.4`
  - Build timestamp: 2026-07-16 04:09:50 UTC
  - Signed with debug keystore (installable on real devices, not Play Store-ready)
  - Baseline profiles generated for API 28+ and API 31+

### In Progress
- Mobile cleanup code changes (login.tsx, platform-persistence.ts, variables.tsx, chat.tsx, _layout.tsx, home.tsx, app.config.ts) have NOT been committed to git or pushed to GitHub — local HEAD is `428eea31` (pre-cleanup), GitHub HEAD is `21e7bb80` (UI migration only)

### Blocked
- Real device testing cannot be done from sandbox — requires owner to install APK on physical Android device
- Owner AI chat endpoint (`/api/ivx/owner-ai` POST) requires bearer token — `IVX_OWNER_TOKEN` env var returned auth guard error (token may be expired or wrong format)
- Render deploy ID cannot be retrieved via API (returns empty fields for all deploy queries)
- APK is signed with debug keystore, not a production release keystore (sufficient for device testing, not for Play Store submission)
- 6 dead code references in `login.tsx` remain (constant `OWNER_LOGIN_PHONE_PROOF_BUILD`, error message string, orphaned style definitions `authVersionBadge`, `authVersionBadgeText`, `repairDebugCard`, `repairDebugTitle`) — UI elements already removed so they don't affect the built APK

## Key Decisions
- Created one canonical component instead of modifying existing cards — single source of truth
- Used `mode="reel"` vs `mode="feed"` in canonical card for full-screen vs scrollable contexts
- Removed `expo-location/android` directory rather than upgrading the package — app doesn't import or use `expo-location` anywhere
- Used debug keystore for APK signing — sufficient for real-device testing, Play Store submission would require generating a proper release keystore
- Cleaned `console.log`/`console.warn` but kept `console.error` in error boundaries (`componentDidCatch`) — legitimate error handling
- Converted `console.log` in `JVErrorBoundary.componentDidCatch` to `console.error` for consistency

## Next Steps
- Commit and push mobile cleanup changes to GitHub (login.tsx, platform-persistence.ts, variables.tsx, chat.tsx, _layout.tsx, home.tsx, app.config.ts)
- Clean up remaining 6 dead code references in `login.tsx` (remove constant, fix error string, remove orphaned styles)
- Provide APK to owner for real-device installation and testing
- Owner must test on real Android device: cold launch, owner login, logout/login, session persistence, Owner AI chat, image/PDF attachment, message persistence, Main/Reels/Members/Investors/Properties/Deal detail/View Deal/Invest Now/notifications/back button/no infinite loading/no crashes
- Collect screenshots of owner login and Owner AI chat from real device
- Consider generating a proper release keystore for Play Store submission

## Critical Context
- GitHub token: `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`
- GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`
- Render API key: `rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs`
- Render service ID: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0`
- Render service name: `ivx-holdings-platform`, autoDeploy: yes
- AI key on Render: `vck_5ybSHs1ylBLpQL2mS1gYXzyAQwtLsTqKfjgsQtWH5th6DL2MXB3ReOFy`
- Current GitHub HEAD: `21e7bb80` (UI migration, does NOT include mobile cleanup)
- Local HEAD: `428eea31` (pre-cleanup, has earlier video view fixes)
- Production health: `https://api.ivxholding.com/health` → commit `21e7bb8057b85c05dbf60138803520f313ec6de2`, bootTime `2026-07-16T03:49:33.992Z`
- Backend deployment marker: `ivx-owner-ai-hono-autodeploy-live`
- AI adapter: vercel_ai_gateway, baseUrl `https://ai-gateway.vercel.sh/v1`, model `openai/gpt-4o`, adapterVersion `3.0.85`
- APK path: `expo/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk` (81MB, v1.4.4, versionCode 35)
- Android SDK: `/opt/android-sdk`, NDK: `27.1.12297006`, build-tools: `35.0.0`, platforms: `android-36`
- Java: `/usr/lib/jvm/jdk-17.0.13+11` (Temurin 17)
- Expo SDK: `~54.0.35`, React Native: `0.81.5`, Expo Router: `~6.0.24`
- Gradle: 8.14.3, AGP version from version catalog
- `eas.json` production build type is `app-bundle` (AAB for Play Store) — used local Gradle `assembleRelease` for APK instead
- Live data confirmed: Casa Rosario `casa-rosario-001` (Pembroke Pines FL, ROI 30%, $1.4M), Jacksonville Prime `JV-202603-5190`, Perez Residence `perez-residence-001`

## Relevant Files
- `expo/components/CanonicalInvestmentReelCard.tsx` — canonical reel card (1031 lines), single shared card for all screens
- `expo/lib/reel-formatters.ts` — shared formatting utilities (`formatCount`, `compactCurrency`)
- `expo/__tests__/canonical-reel-card.test.ts` — 25 regression tests, all passing
- `expo/app/videos.tsx` — uses canonical card (mode="reel")
- `expo/components/InvestorFirstFeed.tsx` — uses canonical card (mode="feed")
- `expo/app/landing.tsx` — uses canonical card (mode="feed"), console.logs cleaned
- `expo/app/(tabs)/invest/index.tsx` — uses canonical card, console.logs cleaned
- `expo/app/jv-invest.tsx` — 10s timeout, error states, retry/back, console.logs cleaned
- `expo/app/login.tsx` — MODIFIED: old Render URL fixed, debug UI removed (authVersionBadge, configStatusBanner, repairDebugCard, telemetry panel); 6 dead code references remain
- `expo/app/(tabs)/chat.tsx` — MODIFIED: diagnostics "Proof" button removed, console.logs cleaned
- `expo/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx` — MODIFIED: `useMemo` moved before conditional returns (lint fix), console.logs cleaned
- `expo/app/(tabs)/(home)/home.tsx` — MODIFIED: console.logs cleaned, `console.log` in error boundary → `console.error`
- `expo/lib/platform-persistence.ts` — MODIFIED: old Render URL → `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- `expo/app/ivx/variables.tsx` — MODIFIED: old Render URL and bypass text removed
- `expo/app.config.ts` — MODIFIED: version 1.4.4, versionCode 35, buildMarker updated
- `expo/android/` — NEW: generated by `expo prebuild`, contains native Android project
- `expo/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk` — NEW: signed release APK (81MB, v1.4.4)
- `expo/android/local.properties` — NEW: `sdk.dir=/opt/android-sdk`
- `node_modules/expo-location/android` — REMOVED: incompatible with SDK 54, app doesn't use it
